data.title: Nasdaq drops over 2% as Apple beats expectations with $94 billion revenue in Q3, EPS at $1.57, surpassing $1.42 consensus.
data.description: This morning, the U.S. stock market saw a decline, especially with the Nasdaq Composite dropping over 2% on Friday. During the market's opening, the Dow decreased by 1.50% to 43,468.44, the NASDAQ went down by 2.22% to 20,653.99, and the S&P 500 fell by 1.71% to 6,231.17. Consumer staples shares experienced a 0.7% increase, while consumer discretionary stocks dropped by 3.7%. In noteworthy news, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) surpassed expectations with third-quarter results, reporting $94 billion in revenue, exceeding the analyst estimate of $89.04 billion by 5.6%. Earnings per share were $1.57, higher than the expected $1.42 per share. Tenon Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: TNON) shares were among those showing upward movement. For more details, the full article is accessible online.

data.title: Conflux (CFX) readies for v3.0.0 upgrade, a hardfork to add 8 new CIPs. Nodes must update before epoch 129680000 by Sept 1.
data.description: Conflux (CFX) has revealed plans for a significant network enhancement through the v3.0.0 upgrade, which involves the implementation of eight new Conflux Improvement Proposals (CIPs) via a hardfork. In order to ensure seamless transition and continued operation on the network, all node operators are required to update their systems prior to the epoch hitting 129680000, which is anticipated to occur around September 1. This upgrade marks a pivotal moment for Conflux as it aims to enhance the functionalities and performance of its blockchain network.

data.title: TSA partners with IDEMIA to offer discounted $15 TSA PreCheck enrollments at 500+ centers nationwide.
data.description: Starting August 1, 2025, TSA PreCheck® applicants can access family benefits at over 500 IDEMIA enrollment centers across the US. IDEMIA Public Security North America, a top provider of secure biometric solutions, will facilitate this service.

data.description: The cryptocurrency ICP is currently trading at $5.09, marking a decrease of 5.05% within a 24-hour period. The currency is experiencing increasing regulatory pressure and has broken below significant moving averages, signifying technical challenges.

data.title: SIGGRAPH 2025 Experience Hall to feature 5 interactive programs, showcasing art and technology, including spatial storytelling.
data.description: In 2025, the SIGGRAPH Experience Hall is set to make a comeback with five interactive programs showcasing cutting-edge art and technology, including the introduction of Spatial Storytelling. Taking place in Vancouver, BC on August 1st, 2025, this event promises to offer a unique experience that goes beyond a typical exhibition.

data.title: H-FARM International Schools join Nord Anglia Education in global network after regulatory approvals. Nord Anglia's entry into Italy.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Nord Anglia Education, a prominent international schools group, revealed that the H-FARM International Schools have officially become part of its global network after obtaining all required regulatory approvals. This development signifies Nord Anglia's debut in Italy, expanding its reach to further enhance educational offerings.

data.title: Global digital twin market to reach $149.81 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 47.9% from $21.14 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects substantial growth in the global digital twin market. The market size is forecasted to increase from USD 21.14 billion in 2025 to USD 149.81 billion by 2030, representing a notable CAGR of 47.9%. This surge in the digital twin industry reflects a growing trend towards innovative technologies shaping various sectors worldwide.

data.title: Bitcoin falls short of $116K after US jobs boost; Fed rate cut odds surpass 75%. Bulls face challenge in preventing market decline.
data.description: Despite potential tailwinds from the US labor market, Bitcoin bulls are facing challenges in preventing the market from reaching new three-week lows.
